ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Date, flesh and skin, pitted, dried
Cashew nut, dry-grilled, no added salt

ingredients_text: British Wholegrain Cereals (60%) (BARLEY Flakes, WHEAT Flakes, OAT Flakes, Toasted WHEAT Flakes), Dried Fruit (27%) (Raisins, Chopped Dates), Nuts (11%) (Chopped BRAZIL NUTS,CASHEW NUT Pieces, ALMONDS Roasted HAZELNUTS), Seeds (2%) (Sunflower Seeds, Pumpkin Seeds).
